name: Beef Jerky (Gnow Yoke Gone)
recipeInstructions:
1. Partially freeze the meat first, then thinly slice it.
2. Marinate the beef slices in the remaining ingredients for at least 1 day.
Note: Bake single layer at 250°F for 45-55 minutes. Chinese Beef Jerky is a favorite snack in China with a sweet flavor and no spiciness. Ready-made jerkies can be purchased in Chinatown, but this homemade recipe is a great alternative if needed.
